detect.title: Add Eltako gateway
detect.description: Select the gateway (from configuration.yaml) and the serial path / IP address it is connected to.

manual.title: Add Eltako gateway (manual path)
manual.description: Select the gateway (from configuration.yaml) and enter its serial path / IP address manually.

error.invalid_gateway_path: No valid gateway found for this path.
error.no_serial_path_available: No serial path available. Try to reconnect your USB plug.

abort.no_configuration_available: No gateway available to add. All configured gateways are already set up.

missing_base_id.title: Eltako gateway has no base ID
missing_base_id.description: The gateway "{gateway}" ({gateway_type}) has no base ID (00-00-00-00). This gateway type does not query its base ID automatically, so every received telegram is being ignored (the received-message counter still increases, but no entities update). Set a valid `base_id` for this gateway in your Eltako configuration and reload the integration.
